---
title: "Global Health Indicator Explorer"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
---

## Global Health Indicator Explorer

- Interactive health data explorer
- Real-time data + AI summary

::: notes
Today I will present an interactive tool for exploring global health indicators with real-time data and AI-generated summaries.
:::

---

## Problem

- Health data is hard to interpret
- Users see numbers, but not insights

::: notes
Global health data is available, but it is often difficult for users to interpret trends from raw numbers.
:::

---

## What this product does

- Select country, indicator, year range
- View trend automatically
- Generate plain-language summary

::: notes
Users can interactively explore data and generate a simple explanation of the trend.
:::

---

## Demo (Live)

- Change country / indicator
- Adjust year range
- Click **Generate Summary**

::: notes
Now I will demonstrate the app. The plot updates automatically, and the summary is generated on demand.
:::

---

## Design & Trade-offs

- API-based data (dynamic, no local data)
- LLM summary + rule-based fallback
- Modular structure (separate R files)

::: notes
I used API data to keep it dynamic, and combined LLM with a fallback to ensure reliability. The code is modular for maintainability.
:::

---

## Limitations & Improvements

- Depends on API and internet
- Limited indicators
- Future: more data, export, better UI

::: notes
The app depends on external APIs and has limited coverage. With more time, I would expand features and improve usability.
:::

---

## Thank you

Questions?
